name: async-button
description: A button that owns its own pending and error state: give it an onClick that returns a promise and it disables, shows a spinner, sets aria-busy and announces the result.

notes: Disables and sets aria-busy while the promise is pending — no double-submit
The spinner is decorative (aria-hidden) and respects prefers-reduced-motion
Success and failure are announced via a polite live region
Keeps the native <button> semantics and focus behaviour

intents: a button with a built-in loading and error state
submit or save button that disables while pending
prevent double submit on async actions
